creator: handy@lambic.spasci.com
text:
Upgrade of the AfterStep port.  Having played with it for a while, 
I'm not sure if it's quite ready to replace afterstep-1.0.  I've 
talked this over with Andreas Klemm, and we were thinking a repository
copy and making this 'afterstep-devel' might be a worthy endeavor
for those who gotta have it.

Fix: 

The diff against afterstep-1.0:
http://lambic.spasci.com/~handy/afterstep/afterstep.diff

The port, presented wholesale
http://lambic.spasci.com/~handy/afterstep/afterstep-1.4.tar.gz
